title: carex tianschanica
intro: Carex tianschanica, also known as Chinese sedge, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cyperaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Carex tianshanica include lowering blood pressure, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Carex tianschanica is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being dried and used in capsules or powders.
